payload.answer: We have conflicting employment facts about Sam: one says Sam works at Goldman, another says Sam left Goldman and joined Point72. I’m not storing either as definitive until this is resolved.

entity_resolution.reason: Same person (Sam) has contradictory employer/location statements (Goldman vs Point72) with opposing employment status (works at vs left/joined).

details: Detected conflicting statements in existing memory vs new input: 'Sam works at Goldman' vs 'Sam left Goldman and joined Point72'.
No memory update performed pending clarification.

repair_options: Confirm current employer for Sam (Goldman or Point72).
If both are true historically, store a timeline with dates (e.g., left Goldman in YEAR, joined Point72 in YEAR).
If one is incorrect, specify which statement to retract.
